creation-site-web-maroc.metaTitle: Website creation price Morocco 2026 | Indicative ranges
creation-site-web-maroc.metaDescription: How much does a website cost in Morocco? Indicative ranges by tier (basic, standard, premium), pricing factors and FAQ. Custom quote after audit.
creation-site-web-maroc.intro: Website cost in Morocco varies by project type, page count, features and design level. This page shows indicative ranges — a firm quote requires scoping your exact needs.

overview.what: Pricing guide for website creation in Morocco with three indicative tiers and key budget factors.
overview.who: SME leaders, retailers, training centers and organizations planning a corporate, brochure or e-commerce site.
benefits: Understand ballpark figures before a sales call
Identify the project level matching your ambition
Anticipate cost items (design, development, content, SEO)
takeaways: Three indicative tiers: basic, standard, premium
Typical project budget from 6,000 to 120,000 MAD
Firm quote only after audit and scoping

factors: Page count and site architecture complexity
CRM, analytics and marketing tool integrations

basic.name: Basic
basic.description: Compact brochure site for a professional online presence.

standard.name: Standard
standard.description: Enriched corporate or brochure site with content and integrations.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Custom project: e-commerce, portal or advanced platform.

creation-site-web-maroc.disclaimer: These ranges are indicative and may vary by sector, timeline and technical requirements. Mohtaoua does not commit to fixed pricing without a prior audit. Request a custom quote for an exact figure.

contextLinks.packs: View our marketing packs and pricing

faqs.question: How much does a brochure website cost in Morocco?
faqs.answer: A professional brochure site typically ranges from 6,000 to 35,000 MAD depending on pages, design and features. E-commerce or custom projects can exceed 40,000 MAD.

faqs.question: Does the price include hosting and domain?
faqs.answer: Often not in the initial creation price. Hosting, domain and maintenance may be billed as a separate annual subscription, specified in the quote.

faqs.question: Do you offer staged payment?
faqs.answer: Yes, depending on project size. A payment schedule is defined in the quote after scope validation.

faqs.question: How do I get an exact quote?
faqs.answer: Contact us for a free audit. We scope needs, features and timeline before providing a firm quote.

seo-maroc.metaTitle: SEO price Morocco 2026 | Indicative monthly ranges
seo-maroc.metaDescription: How much does SEO cost in Morocco? Indicative monthly ranges by tier, pricing factors and FAQ. Organic search for Moroccan businesses.
seo-maroc.intro: SEO budget in Morocco depends on keyword competition, current site health and visibility goals. Here are indicative monthly ranges — a custom plan always follows an audit.

overview.what: Pricing guide for organic search (SEO) in Morocco with three monthly support tiers.
overview.who: Businesses, e-commerce and training centers seeking qualified organic traffic.
benefits: Understand what's included at each tier
Align SEO investment with business goals
takeaways: Typical monthly budget from 3,000 to 40,000 MAD
Technical and editorial audit as prerequisite
SEO results over 3 to 12 months depending on competition

factors: Content volume to produce or optimize
Link building and current domain authority

standard.name: Standard
standard.description: National SEO for SMEs with lead goals.

premium.name: Premium
includes: Coordination with paid media and CRO

seo-maroc.disclaimer: These monthly ranges are indicative. SEO is an ongoing investment: results depend on competition, site quality and action consistency. No ranking guarantees without a prior audit.

contextLinks.packs: View our marketing packs and pricing

faqs.question: How much does SEO cost per month in Morocco?
faqs.answer: Typically 3,000 to 15,000 MAD/month for an SME, up to 40,000 MAD/month for highly competitive or multi-language markets.

faqs.question: How long until SEO results?
faqs.answer: Early signals often appear within 3 to 6 months. Significant results usually require 6 to 12 months depending on competition.

faqs.question: Is SEO compatible with Google Ads?
faqs.answer: Yes, and often recommended: paid drives immediate leads while SEO builds durable visibility.

faqs.question: How do I get a custom SEO quote?
faqs.answer: Request a free audit. We analyze your site, competitors and goals before proposing a plan and monthly budget.

application-mobile-maroc.metaTitle: Mobile app price Morocco 2026 | Indicative ranges
application-mobile-maroc.metaDescription: How much does a mobile app cost in Morocco? Ranges by tier (MVP, standard, premium), technical factors and FAQ.
application-mobile-maroc.intro: Mobile app cost in Morocco varies widely by platform (iOS, Android), features, backend integrations and design level. This page provides indicative ballpark figures.

overview.what: Pricing guide for mobile app development in Morocco.
overview.who: Startups, SMEs and organizations launching a business app, marketplace or customer service app.
takeaways: Typical project budget from 60,000 to 800,000 MAD
MVP possible from 60,000 MAD depending on scope
Maintenance and updates to plan after launch

application-mobile-maroc.factorsTitle: Factors that influence mobile app price
factors: Screen count and user journey complexity
Backend, API and third-party integrations (CRM, ERP)
Custom UX/UI design vs standard components

basic.name: MVP
basic.description: Minimum viable app to validate a concept.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Complex platform, marketplace or high-traffic app.

application-mobile-maroc.disclaimer: These ranges are indicative. Choice between Flutter, React Native or native, plus backend complexity, can shift budget by 30 to 50%. Precise technical scoping is required before any firm quote.

contextLinks.service: Explore our Flutter mobile development service

faqs.question: How much does a mobile app cost in Morocco?
faqs.answer: An MVP starts around 60,000 MAD. A full business app often ranges from 130,000 to 300,000 MAD. Complex platforms can exceed 350,000 MAD.

faqs.question: Flutter or native: impact on price?
faqs.answer: Flutter (cross-platform) generally reduces cost vs two separate native apps. Native may be preferable for very platform-specific needs.

faqs.question: Does the price include maintenance?
faqs.answer: Post-launch maintenance (fixes, OS updates, evolutions) is often billed as a separate monthly subscription, defined in the contract.

faqs.question: How do I get a mobile app quote?
faqs.answer: Contact us with your specifications or request a scoping workshop. We quote after detailed technical analysis.

logo-maroc.metaTitle: Logo price Morocco 2026 | Visual identity creation ranges
logo-maroc.metaDescription: How much does a logo cost in Morocco? Indicative ranges by tier, pricing factors and FAQ. Professional logo and visual identity creation.
logo-maroc.intro: Logo price in Morocco depends on creative research depth, variation count and whether a full brand guidelines package is delivered. Here are indicative ranges to guide you.

overview.what: Pricing guide for logo and visual identity creation in Morocco.
overview.who: Entrepreneurs, SMEs, artisans and organizations launching or refreshing their brand image.
benefits: Understand difference between simple logo and full identity
Know what's delivered at each tier
takeaways: Logo alone: 2,500 to 15,000 MAD depending on tier
Source files and guidelines included in standard and premium tiers

factors: Number of creative proposals and revision rounds

standard.name: Standard
standard.description: Professional logo with variations and source files.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Full visual identity and brand platform.

logo-maroc.disclaimer: These ranges are indicative. Very low-cost logos may lack originality or usable files. Mohtaoua delivers professional assets suited to your sector — firm quote after creative brief.

faqs.question: How much does a logo cost in Morocco?
faqs.answer: A professional logo typically ranges from 2,500 to 15,000 MAD. Full visual identity with guidelines can reach 18,000 to 40,000 MAD.

faqs.question: What files are delivered?
faqs.answer: Depending on tier: PNG, JPG, and in standard/premium source files (AI, SVG) plus web and print variations.

faqs.question: How many revisions are included?
faqs.answer: Generally 2 to 3 revision rounds per tier. Additional revisions may be billed if the brief changes significantly.

faqs.question: How do I order a logo?
faqs.answer: Contact us for a creative brief. We scope deliverables, timeline and budget before starting graphic research.

google-ads-maroc.metaTitle: Google Ads price Morocco 2026 | Indicative media budget
google-ads-maroc.metaDescription: How much to invest in Google Ads in Morocco? Monthly media budget ranges (excluding agency fees), factors and FAQ.
google-ads-maroc.intro: This page presents indicative Google Ads media budget ranges — the amount invested directly on Google's platform. Campaign management fees are billed separately by the agency.

budgetNotes.mediaBudget: The amounts below represent monthly Google Ads media budget only. They do not include Mohtaoua fees for campaign management.
budgetNotes.agencyFees: Management fees: typically 15 to 25% of media budget or a monthly flat fee depending on scope. See /pricing or request a quote after audit.

overview.what: Guide to Google Ads media budget ranges in Morocco, separate from agency fees.
overview.who: SMEs, e-commerce businesses and organisations structuring their Search/Display campaigns.

google-ads-maroc.factorsTitle: Factors that influence Google Ads media budget
google-ads-maroc.disclaimer: Indicative media budget ranges only. Management fees not included. Firm quote after audit.

faqs.question: Does the price include agency management?
faqs.answer: No. These are media budgets on Google. Management is billed separately.

faqs.question: Minimum media budget?
faqs.answer: Around 4,000 to 6,000 MAD/month for usable Search data.

faqs.question: Pay for management only?
faqs.answer: You cannot run ads without a media budget on the platform.

faqs.question: How to get a full quote?
faqs.answer: Free audit: recommended media budget + management fees.

meta-ads-maroc.metaTitle: Meta Ads price Morocco 2026 | Indicative media budget
meta-ads-maroc.metaDescription: Meta Ads media budget in Morocco (excluding agency fees). Ranges, factors and FAQ.
meta-ads-maroc.intro: Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram) media budget ranges. Management fees are separate and billed by the agency.

budgetNotes.mediaBudget: Amounts = monthly Meta media budget only. Excludes Mohtaoua fees.
budgetNotes.agencyFees: Fees: 15–25% of media or monthly flat fee. See /pricing.

overview.what: Guide to Meta Ads media budget in Morocco.

meta-ads-maroc.factorsTitle: Factors influencing Meta Ads media budget
meta-ads-maroc.disclaimer: Indicative Meta media budget only. Agency fees not included.

faqs.question: Does it include ad creative?
faqs.answer: Not for the media spend shown. Creative and management = separate package or /pricing packs.

faqs.question: Minimum Meta media budget?
faqs.answer: Around 5,000 MAD/month to test in Morocco.

faqs.question: Difference from /pricing?
faqs.answer: Packs include management and creative. This page isolates the media line item.

faqs.question: How to get a quote?
faqs.answer: Free audit: media + fees based on your goals.
